division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
text: Every person convicted of an infraction for a violation of Section 23135 shall be punished by a fine of fifty dollars ($50).
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 1. Penalties [42000 - 42032]
#### Article 1. Public Offenses [42000 - 42010]
##### § 42001.9

Every person convicted of an infraction for a violation of Section 23135 shall be punished by a fine of fifty dollars ($50).

*(Added by Stats. 1978, Ch. 421.)*

subsections.text: Every person convicted of an infraction for a violation of Section 23135 shall be punished by a fine of fifty dollars ($50).
